rulings.Case Title: CHRISTY STYER VS. DAVID JAH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn, Mtn To Set Aside & Vacate
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 22, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT DAVID JAH'S Motion To Set Aside & Vacate DENIED. To the extent this motion is a motion for reconsideration, it is DENIED as Defendant failed to meet his burden under CCP 1008. To the extent this is a motion under CCP 473(d) it is denied as defendant failed to show that jud/gment in this case and/or interlocutory judgment are void. Tanner v. Best's Estate (1940) 40 Cal.App.2nd 442 is distinguishable. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZAHID SHAIKH VS. JOHN SPENCER et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 22, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANT JOHN SPENCER'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment GRANTED, subject to (1) defendant posting $4,628.36 with the Court no later than April 22, 2014 by 4 p.m.; and (2) defendant filing answer no later than April 22, 2014 by 4 p.m. Defendant to present two copies of proposed order to the Court. =(501/REQ)
